title: lettsomia candicans
intro: Lettsomia candicans, also known as the New Caledonian mistletoe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Lettsomia candicans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Pacific region.
